title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Solutions When PayPal and Stripe Ban Your Account — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, and PayPal has banned your account due to geographic restrictions. You've tried Stripe, but it's not an option for you either. Now, you're left wondering how to sell your digital products without breaking the bank or struggling with complex payment solutions. Unchained Commerce is here to help. Our platform provides a permanent structural alternative to conventional payment processors, giving you the freedom to sell your digital goods without the hassle of geographic restrictions or banking limitations.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal and Stripe offer a one-size-fits-all solution, but this approach often leads to restrictions and limitations for creators in certain countries. They use a risk-based approach to assess the likelihood of chargebacks and fraud, which can result in account bans for creators in high-risk countries. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) and Core Shop Engine ($49.99) are designed to work together seamlessly, offering a flexible and customizable solution for digital creators. Our platform integrates with NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports over 300 coins and doesn't require KYC or buyer accounts, making it the perfect alternative for creators in restricted countries.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe have a long list of restricted countries, and their policies are often vague and confusing. Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, takes a clear and transparent approach to working with creators in restricted countries. Our platform doesn't require any complicated setup or paperwork, and we don't have any restrictions on the types of digital products you can sell. With Web3 Wallet Connect and Core Shop Engine, you can sell your digital goods to buyers from all over the world, without worrying about account bans or restricted access.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

PayPal and Stripe charge high fees for transactions, and their payment speeds can be slow. Unchained Commerce offers a more cost-effective solution, with lower fees and faster payment speeds. Our platform uses NOWPayments, which offers instant payment processing and competitive fees. With Web3 Wallet Connect and Core Shop Engine, you can say goodbye to slow payment speeds and high fees, and hello to faster payment processing and lower costs.
PayPal and Stripe have a long list of restricted countries, making it impossible for digital creators to sell their goods globally.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

PayPal and Stripe require manual intervention for delivery and payment processing, which can lead to delays and errors. Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine and Admin Dashboard ($29.99) are designed to automate delivery and payment processing, making it easy to sell your digital goods and get paid quickly. With Web3 Wallet Connect and Core Shop Engine, you can automate delivery and payment processing, reducing the risk of errors and delays.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which solution is right for you? If you're a digital creator in a restricted country, Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect and Core Shop Engine are the perfect choice. Our platform offers a flexible and customizable solution, with lower fees and faster payment speeds. With NOWPayments, you can say goodbye to high fees and slow payment speeds, and hello to faster payment processing and lower costs.
